description: Battle time extension setting - allow referee to extend or auto-end
context:
Beads description:
Add a battle setting that controls whether the referee can extend battle time after it expires.

## Behavior
- **If checked (allow_time_extension = true)**: Works like current behavior - battle stays in pending mode after time runs out until referee clicks 'End Battle'
- **If unchecked (allow_time_extension = false)**: Battle immediately transitions to recap screen when time expires

## Why
Currently all battles require manual referee intervention to end. This adds flexibility for:
- Casual battles that should auto-end
- Streamlined flow when ref is busy
- Solo practice sessions

## Scope
- Schema: Add boolean field to battle table
- UI: Checkbox in battle settings (lobby)
- Logic: Auto-redirect to recap when timer ends if setting is false
- Default: true (maintains current behavior)
